---
title: 'SQuant: On-the-Fly Data-Free Quantization via Diagonal Hessian Approximation'
author:
- Cong Guo
- Yuxian Qiu
- Jingwen Leng
- Xiaotian Gao
- Chen Zhang
- Yunxin Liu
- Fan Yang
- Yuhao Zhu
- Minyi Guo
categories:
- Show All
- Work We Contributed to
topics:
- mlsys
url_source: https://openreview.net/pdf?id=JXhROKNZzOc
code_source: https://github.com/clevercool/SQuant
journ: ICLR
year: 2022
contrib: Work We Contributed to
image: featured.png
pub_number: 54
---
